document_metadata.title: Bernard Mensah: Bristol Rovers forward joins Lincoln City on loan
document_metadata.first_words: # Bernard Mensah: Bristol Rovers forward joins Lincoln City on loan - Published League Two side Lincoln City have signed Bristol Rovers forward Bernard Mensah on loan until the end of the season. The 23-year-old has featured nine times for the Pirates since joining the club from National League side Aldershot Town in January. The former Watford trainee scored 14 goals in 56 league appearances during 18 months with the Shots. He could make his debut for the Imps against Exeter City on Saturday. Find all the latest football transfers on our dedicated page. - Published18 August 2018 ## Around the BBC ## Related internet links The BBC is not responsible for the content of external sites.

# Bernard Mensah: Bristol Rovers forward joins Lincoln City on loan

- Published31 August 2018
Shareclose panelShare pageCopy link[About sharing](https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms/can-i-share-things-from-the-bbc)![Bernard Mensah in action for Bristol Rovers](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/624/cpsprodpb/3FEC/production/_103246361_bernardmensah.jpg)Image source, Rex FeaturesImage caption, 

Bernard Mensah began his career at Watford

**League Two side Lincoln City have signed Bristol Rovers forward Bernard Mensah on loan until the end of the season.**

The 23-year-old has featured nine times for the Pirates since joining the club from National League side Aldershot Town in January.

The former Watford trainee scored 14 goals in 56 league appearances during 18 months with the Shots.

He could make his debut for the Imps against Exeter City on Saturday.

# Bernard Mensah: Bristol Rovers forward joins Lincoln City on loan

- Published31 August 2018

Shareclose panelShare pageCopy link[About sharing](https://www.bbc.co.uk/usingthebbc/terms/can-i-share-things-from-the-bbc)![Bernard Mensah in action for Bristol Rovers](https://ichef.bbci.co.uk/ace/standard/624/cpsprodpb/3FEC/production/_103246361_bernardmensah.jpg)Image source, Rex FeaturesImage caption, 

Bernard Mensah began his career at Watford

**League Two side Lincoln City have signed Bristol Rovers forward Bernard Mensah on loan until the end of the season.**

The 23-year-old has featured nine times for the Pirates since joining the club from National League side Aldershot Town in January.

The former Watford trainee scored 14 goals in 56 league appearances during 18 months with the Shots.

He could make his debut for the Imps against Exeter City on Saturday.
